packet.topic: Eco-friendly shopping and zero waste lifestyle
packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Wide aspect ratio suitable for packaging backgrounds, blog headers, and advertising banners emphasizing sustainable lifestyle.
packet.positive_prompt: Flat lay of reusable shopping bags, glass jars filled with grains, bamboo utensils, fresh organic produce on rustic wooden surface, natural textures like wood and linen, earth-tone colors, biodegradable materials, no brand names, no logos, no copyrighted packaging, bright natural light
